name: Sauteed Pork Tenderloin Medallions (Mf)
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces pork tenderloin, trimmed of fat
2 large tomatoes, seeded and chopped (about 3 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat the oil.
2. Add the pork medallions and sauté them over high heat for 2 minutes on each side to brown them.
3. Lower the heat and continue cooking slowly for about 5 minutes or until just cooked through. Do not overcook as they will become tough.
4. Remove the pork medallions to a serving plate when done.
5. To the remaining oil, add cumin, turmeric, and tomatoes. Stir for a few seconds to heat the tomatoes.
6. Season with salt and crushed red pepper to taste.
7. Spoon the mixture over the cooked pork medallions.
Yield: 4 servings
